bullets: GBN stands for Great Britain Notification.
AG stands for Animals and Germinals.
26 is the two-digit year of allocation (2026).
7K8M2P is a six-character Crockford base32 non-guessable identifier (the body).

Values come from the named MDM commodity list. Search supports common name, species (scientific name) and commodity code
Where applicable for given commodity, user is able to filter species by type
User may select one or more species up to the agreed maximum

Bos spp. (Cattle species)
Bos taurus (Cattle)

conditions_values.text:
User must select one transporter type:
Commercial transporter
Private transporter

bullets: Conditional: required when Transporter type = Commercial transporter.
Commercial transporters are consumed from MDM approved transporters.
If a trader creates a new commercial transporter, it is restricted to NI.
See Standard Address Block for field-level validation.
